globalNews.title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
globalNews.summary: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.

globalNews.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
globalNews.summary: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

globalNews.title: BBC at the site of China's worst mining disaster in more than a decade
globalNews.summary: At least 82 people have been killed after a gas explosion at the Liushenyu mine in China.

globalNews.title: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
globalNews.summary: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.

globalNews.title: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
globalNews.summary: The 39-year-old was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: CFTC officials who questioned prediction markets were suspended: NYT
cryptoNews.summary: A New York Times investigation found that senior CFTC officials who raised concerns about Polymarket, Crypto.com and Gemini were suspended and pushed out.

cryptoNews.title: Blockchain researcher defends Ethereum Foundation, says it’s ‘exactly’ doing its job
cryptoNews.summary: William Mougayar says critics are measuring the Ethereum Foundation by the wrong standard, claiming it was never meant to pump ETH or court institutions.

cryptoNews.title: Why is Bitcoin falling despite pro-crypto Kevin Warsh becoming Fed chair?
cryptoNews.summary: Rising short-term bond yields and Warsh's hawkish comments in the past are reviving fears of a December rate hike, which could slam the brakes on Bitcoin's recovery.

cryptoNews.title: Euro and USD stablecoins depeg amid ongoing $2.8M StablR exploit
cryptoNews.summary: The suspected cause is a private key compromise of one owner in the minting multisig account, said Blockaid.

aiNews.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
aiNews.summary: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.

aiNews.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
aiNews.summary: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

aiNews.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
aiNews.summary: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

aiNews.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
aiNews.summary: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

aiNews.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
aiNews.summary: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.
